all.critique:
I've reviewed the revised analysis and overall it is quite clear and well structured. It outlines the major steps—from synthetic graph reconstruction to classifier training and testing—and emphasizes the critical point of handling synthetic labels. A few points, however, might benefit from further clarification or detail:
